summary_text: Top predictors of views_public: last_peak_position (r=+0.42), ms_emotional_intensity_mean_scale_var (r=-0.34), laughter_marker_count (r=+0.34). LASSO-stable for views_public: last_peak_position. Top predictors of engagement_like_ratio: ms_emotional_intensity_max_max (r=+0.48), ms_emotional_intensity_mean_max (r=+0.48), escalation_sentiment (r=+0.33). Top predictors of engagement_comment_ratio: thumb_face_count (r=+0.35), ms_word_density_max (r=-0.34), last_peak_position (r=-0.33). Top predictors of engagement_overall_ratio: ms_emotional_intensity_max_max (r=+0.47), ms_emotional_intensity_mean_max (r=+0.47), ms_emotional_intensity_mean_scale_var (r=+0.36). Top predictors of outlier_potential: peak_spacing_cv (r=+0.59), ms_reveal_density_scale_var (r=+0.53), ms_reveal_density_max (r=+0.53). Top predictors of outlier_spike_score: ms_reveal_density_scale_var (r=+0.52), ms_reveal_density_max (r=+0.52), reveal_event_count (r=+0.51).
